block_01: Last month was not a quiet one: from Tesla’s powerful move investing $1.50 billion in Bitcoin, causing it to skyrocket, to Crude oil reaching the highest value since 2020 and Gold dropping lower. Many assets suffered a correction and recovered, while some continue the decline.
block_02: In this article, we look into some of the most popular assets that had a notable performance in February and analyze their movement.
block_03: Read on to learn more about the market changes of last month.
block_04: *past performance is not an indicator of future performance
